summary: LLM actual token and local token must be separated; workflow timeline must match add-img/timeline.png more closely

summary: timeline rail should connect flows like overview, completed check should use overview completed color, generated file token labels should appear above file names, and docs should require LLM/local token measurement for all project snapshots

타임라인 연결선과 토큰 문서 정리
why: 타임라인 flow 연결선과 완료 색상을 overview와 맞추고 LLM 및 Local token 분리 측정 기준을 문서화했습니다

summary: completed timeline rail must not visually pass through check circles, and timeline order must be descending
timeline check node cutout prevents rail bleed-through; timeline rows are sorted newest first
타임라인 정렬과 체크선 보정
why: 완료 timeline의 연결선이 check 원을 관통해 보이지 않게 조정하고 최신 flow가 위에 오도록 내림차순 정렬했습니다

summary: completed check should match overview visual style, timeline rail should remain connected, filter/show more/collapse buttons should be removed, and the right folder tree should expand on folder click
completed check restored to overview success soft style; timeline header actions removed; right file tree folders now expand and collapse on row click
타임라인 버튼과 폴더 펼침 정리
why: 완료 check를 overview 스타일로 맞추고 timeline header 버튼 제거와 우측 folder click 펼침을 반영했습니다

summary: timeline file action should populate the right file tree with current flow files, initial tree should show all files, reset should replace the two search-adjacent icon buttons after filtering, and timeline rail should attach to circles
right file tree now supports selected-flow file scope and reset; initial scope remains all topic files; table/list buttons removed; timeline rail ends at the next circle edge
플로우 파일트리 범위 정리
why: 타임라인 파일 보기 동작을 우측 file tree flow 범위 전환으로 바꾸고 reset으로 전체 파일 상태를 복구하게 했습니다

summary: timeline rail must connect exactly to circle borders, generated file list should show at most three files, and the right file tree should include LLM/local token info
timeline generated files capped at three rows, right file tree rows include LLM/local token chips, and rail endpoints align to completed circle outer ring
파일트리 토큰과 표시 제한 정리
why: 타임라인 생성 파일 표시를 세 개로 제한하고 우측 file tree에 LLM 및 Local token 표시와 rail endpoint 보정을 반영했습니다

summary: timeline rail should be a straight continuous overview-style line, generated file click should open a content modal with LLM/local token usage, and right file tree should not show LLM/local tokens
timeline uses a single continuous rail; generated file rows open a content modal with LLM/local tokens; right file tree token chips removed; topic file content added to dashboard snapshot contract
파일 모달과 타임라인 레일 정리
why: 타임라인을 단일 rail로 이어지게 하고 생성 파일 클릭 시 content modal에서 LLM 및 Local token과 파일 내용을 확인하도록 정리했습니다

summary: timeline rail should connect at circle borders, flow order must match the actual workflow, displayed time must be the actual flow completion time, and file preview modal should open from the right file tree
timeline rows follow actual workflow order; displayed time uses flow completion evidence; file preview modal opens from right file tree rows; timeline generated file rows no longer open preview
타임라인 순서와 파일 미리보기 정리

summary: timeline completed checks should use different colors by flow, rows should be reverse workflow order, generated file rows should omit file-level LLM/local chips, and flow total tokens should remain

역순 타임라인과 플로우 색상 정리

summary: timeline rail and completed check background should be blue, rail must not show behind checks or overshoot the bottom flow, commit rows should be capped at three, and all commits should open in a modal

파란 타임라인과 커밋 모달 정리
